What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive pharmacy services designed for your health and wellness.

💊

Prescription Dispensing

Fast, accurate, and reliable prescription filling service with careful attention to detail.

📖

Medication Guidance

Expert pharmacist guidance on medications, dosages, interactions, and side effects.

📦

Over-the-Counter Medications

Wide selection of OTC medications for common ailments and health concerns.

❤️

Vitamins & Wellness

Premium vitamins, supplements, and wellness products for your health goals.

Trusted Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Real reviews from real customers who trust Lewis Drug Mart.

★★★★★

"The staff here is incredibly friendly and knowledgeable. They took time to explain how to use my new medication and answered all my questions."

Margaret Chen

Regular Customer

★★★★★

"I've been using Lewis Drug Mart for over five years. The pharmacist really knows me and my health needs. I trust their service completely."

David Alleyne

Community Member

★★★★★

Community Trust

Why Choose Lewis Drug Mart?

We're more than a pharmacy – we're your trusted health partner in the community.

👥

Community Trust

Trusted by locals for years with a 4.6-star rating and over 77 five-star reviews.

📖

Expert Guidance

Our skilled pharmacist provides personalized medication guidance and expert health support.

😊

Friendly Service

A warm, welcoming atmosphere where customers feel valued and understood.

📍

Convenient Location

Easy access on Highway 7 with ample parking and nearby public transportation.

📦

Full Range of Products

Everything from prescription medications to vitamins, wellness, and personal care items.

Fully Accessible

Designed and operated with accessibility for all members of our community.
